name: Ritzy Chocolate-Covered Nuts
recipeIngredient: 12 Ounces Chocolate (can use chips -- but if they have a gray bloom, they might not melt)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, boil almond slivers, sugar, and water over low to medium heat until all the water is gone and the sugar crystallizes on the almonds.
2. Pour almond slivers out onto a well-greased baking sheet. Separate clumps with a greased fork.
3. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F oven for about 15 minutes. Be careful not to burn.
4. Melt chocolate over low heat with constant stirring.
5. When candied almonds have cooled, dip them into melted chocolate. Place on foil to set.
